articles.description: Ethereum traders are showing signs of emotional whiplash. Just days after sentiment reached its most bearish point since April, social media data from analytics platform Santiment now shows a full reversal, with ETH discussions turning extremely bullish almost overnight. Key Takeaways Sentiment swing: Ethereum’s bullish-to-bearish ratio jumped from 0. 86 to 2
